Interface DataComponentPredicate.Registered

All Superinterfaces:
DataComponentPredicate, Predicate<DataComponent.Holder>
All Known Implementing Classes:
DataComponentPredicate.ArmorTrim, DataComponentPredicate.AttributeModifiers, DataComponentPredicate.BundleContents, DataComponentPredicate.Container, DataComponentPredicate.CustomData, DataComponentPredicate.Damage, DataComponentPredicate.Enchantments, DataComponentPredicate.FireworkExplosion, DataComponentPredicate.Fireworks, DataComponentPredicate.JukeboxPlayable, DataComponentPredicate.Potions, DataComponentPredicate.StoredEnchantments, DataComponentPredicate.VillagerVariant, DataComponentPredicate.WritableBook, DataComponentPredicate.WrittenBook
Enclosing interface:
DataComponentPredicate
public static sealed interface DataComponentPredicate.Registered extends DataComponentPredicate permits DataComponentPredicate.Damage, DataComponentPredicate.Enchantments, DataComponentPredicate.StoredEnchantments, DataComponentPredicate.Potions, DataComponentPredicate.CustomData, DataComponentPredicate.Container, DataComponentPredicate.BundleContents, DataComponentPredicate.Fireworks, DataComponentPredicate.FireworkExplosion, DataComponentPredicate.WritableBook, DataComponentPredicate.WrittenBook, DataComponentPredicate.AttributeModifiers, DataComponentPredicate.ArmorTrim, DataComponentPredicate.JukeboxPlayable, DataComponentPredicate.VillagerVariant
A component predicate whose codec is registered in the data component predicate type registry.
